Author: Shifty Kiwi
Name: Autominion
Punchline: Summons or dismisses minions based on housing state.
Description: Automatically summons a minion on housing exteriors and dismisses it inside housing interiors or apartments. Main command: /autominion
Changelog: Initial release targeting FFXIV patch 7.45, Dalamud API 14, and .NET 10.
